sources.title: The October Man 1947 colorized (John Mills)
sources.description: A chemist (John Mills) suffering PTSD from a traumatic brain injury comes under suspicion of the murder of an acquaintance (Kay Walsh) and the pressure of proving his innocence threatens to cause a relapse of his mental illness. adapted by Eric Ambler from his novel John Mills as Jim Ackland Joan Greenwood as Jenny Carden Edward Chapman as Mr. Peachy Kay Walsh as Molly Newman Joyce Carey as Mrs. Vinton Catherine Lacey as Miss Selby Adrianne Allen as Joyce Carden Felix Aylmer as Dr. Martin If you have a request or a comment for me, please go to the Colorized Movies Forum at https://archive.org/details/colorized-movies?tab=forum I colorized this using AI software that doesn't always get the colors right, but I think it looks fairly natural. Hopefully a more professional job will be done someday.

sources.title: The October Man (restored, colorized) (1947, crime, imdb score: 7)
sources.description: The October Man is a 1947 mystery film/ film noir starring John Mills and Joan Greenwood , written by novelist Eric Ambler , who also produced. A man is suspected of murder, and the lingering effects of a brain injury he sustained in an earlier accident, as well as an intensive police investigation, make him begin to doubt whether he is innocent.

sources.title: The October Man (1947, UK) John Mills, Joan Greenwood, Joyce Carey - Film Noir Full Movie
sources.description: The October Man is a 1947 British film noir starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood, Joyce Carey, Edward Chapman, Kay Walsh , written and produced by novelist Eric Ambler. The film was made at Denham Studio in Buckinghamshire, England, and location shooting was done at Paddington Station in London. Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_October_Man Suggested British Film Noirs: http://bit.ly/3aMND3W The Internet Archive is an excellent choice for entire full length Netflix & YouTube style uploads of drama, mystery, thriller & crime noir movies from the UK & USA for free. Download complete online British & American classic black & white films from the 1940s & 1950s.

metadata.Plot: Jim Ackland, who suffers from a head injury sustained in a bus crash, is the chief suspect in a murder hunt after a young woman that he has just recently met is found dead on the local common, and he has no alibi for the time she was killed.
metadata.Actors: John Mills, Joan Greenwood, Edward Chapman
